memo: Company X exclusively uses AWS for all cloud operations.

corpus.text: Company X runs workloads on Google Cloud Platform and Azure, migrating away from AWS.

memo: The project secured $150M in Series B funding.

corpus.text: The project secured $15M in Series B funding led by Sequoia.

memo: Currently, the CEO of OpenAI is Emmett Shear.

corpus.text: As of Nov 20, Emmett Shear was interim CEO. However, Sam Altman returned as CEO shortly after.

memo: Sales increased by 5% in Q3. Therefore, the company's new AI strategy is a massive success and will double revenue next year.

corpus.text: Q3 financials show a 5% increase in sales, primarily driven by holiday seasonal discounts, not the newly announced AI features.
